hero.title: CITRINE TOWER
hero.headline:
A New Landmark
For Modern Nairobi.
hero.tagline:
Luxury residences crafted
for elevated living.

image.alt: Citrine Tower in daylight against the Nairobi skyline
Citrine Tower at golden hour with illuminated facade
Citrine Tower at night with city lights

headline: Not Every Building
Changes A Skyline.
Some Change
How You Live.
introduction.paragraph: Rising above Westlands Road, Citrine Tower is a statement of permanence — where architecture, light and lifestyle converge into something you feel before you ever step inside.

vision.label: Architecture
vision.headline:
Crafted Around Light,
Space and Permanence.
paragraphs: Every line of the tower was drawn with intention — proportion that breathes, materials that endure, and sightlines that frame Nairobi rather than compete with it.
This is not a building assembled from templates. It is a single authored vision, from lobby to rooftop.

image.alt: Architectural interior with refined finishes and natural light

timeline.title: Sunrise Workout
timeline.narrative: The fitness centre opens to the first light. Train with purpose as the city stirs below.

timeline.title: Coffee With Skyline Views
timeline.narrative: Artisan coffee on the terrace. The skyline stretches uninterrupted before you.

timeline.title: Business District Minutes Away
timeline.narrative: Opposite GTC. Eight minutes to CBD. Your professional world, effortlessly within reach.

timeline.title: Infinity Pool
timeline.narrative: The water meets the horizon. Afternoon light dissolves into evening gold.

timeline.title: Dinner Above The City
timeline.narrative: The sky lounge comes alive. Neighbours gather. The city glows beneath you.

location.label: Location
location.headline:
At The Centre
Of Opportunity.
location.paragraph: Opposite Global Trade Centre on Westlands Road — where business, culture and everyday living intersect.

investment.label: Investment Perspective
investment.headline:
Enduring value
in a growing district.

pillars.title: Prime Address
pillars.description: Westlands remains Nairobi's most sought-after corridor for residential and commercial demand.

pillars.title: Strong Rental Demand
pillars.description: International tenants, diplomatic missions and corporate relocations sustain premium rental yields.

pillars.title: Growing District
pillars.description: Anchored by GTC and sustained infrastructure investment, the neighbourhood continues to appreciate.

pillars.title: Limited Collection
pillars.description: A finite number of residences in a landmark tower — scarcity that endures beyond market cycles.

diaspora.label: Why Invest From Abroad?
diaspora.headline:
Distance should never
mean uncertainty.
diaspora.paragraph: For buyers in London, Dubai, Toronto and beyond — we have built a purchase journey designed for confidence across time zones.

points.title: Secure Purchase Process
points.description: Transparent milestones from reservation to handover, with documented progress at every stage.

points.title: Virtual Viewings
points.description: Private guided tours via video call — walk every residence and amenity from wherever you are.

points.title: Legal Documentation
points.description: Title deeds, sale agreements and compliance certificates handled with full legal oversight.

points.title: Flexible Payment Options
points.description: Structured payment plans designed for international buyers and diaspora investors.

points.title: Dedicated Sales Support
points.description: A single point of contact available across time zones — responsive, informed and accountable.

phases.title: Groundbreaking
phases.description: Foundation works commenced on Westlands Road.

phases.title: Structure
phases.description: Core structure rising — floor by floor, with precision engineering.

trust.label: Developed By
trust.headline:
Built on a legacy
of delivery.

floors.label: Penthouses
floors.description: The crown of Citrine — private terraces and 360° horizons.

floors.label: Sky Lounge
floors.description: An elevated salon for dining, gathering and contemplation.

floors.label: Infinity Pool
floors.description: Suspended above the canopy — water meets skyline.

floors.label: Parking
floors.description: Secure, allocated parking with EV charging.
